response.justification: Candidate has strong individual-contributor experience (13+ years) with relevant developer-tooling work (test frameworks Trial and Fluent-Asserts, CI/CD setup, MCP code generators), but the resume shows no explicit people-management experience, which is the core of this Level II Manager role. Mobile platform exposure is limited to a brief Apple TV/iOS stint in 2015-2016. Without demonstrated 2+ years of formal team leadership or evidence of leading organizational change, this is a mismatch for a people-leadership role despite a solid technical foundation.
strengths: Long tenure in senior/staff IC roles with broad full-stack and systems experience
Genuine developer-tools background: built test runner (Trial), assertion library, custom web server, CI infrastructure
Track record of teaching and community work (workshops, Selenium course, refactoring dojos) suggesting mentoring instincts
concerns: No explicit people-management or direct-report experience listed anywhere in the resume
Mobile platform experience is minimal and dated (one stint ~2015-2016)
No evidence of strategic roadmap ownership, performance management, or leading organizational change
